mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(NOTICE_FILE_ID),0) AS IDX FROM PI_NOTICE_FILE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO PI_NOTICE_FILE ( USER_NO, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{user_no}, #{file_name}, #{real_file_name}, NOW() )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS NOTICE_FILE_ID
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(DOWNLOAD_FILE_ID),0) AS IDX FROM PI_DOWNLOAD_FILE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pi_download_file ( USER_NO, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{user_no}, #{file_name}, #{real_file_name}, NOW() )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS DOWNLOAD_FILE_ID
mapper.select: SELECT D.*, (CASE WHEN FILE_STATUS = 'completed' THEN CONCAT('완료 (', PROCESS_DATA, ')') WHEN FILE_STATUS = 'wait' THEN CONCAT('대기 (', PROCESS_DATA, ')') WHEN FILE_STATUS = 'down' THEN CONCAT('진행중 (', PROCESS_DATA, ')') ELSE CONCAT('에러 (', PROCESS_DATA, ')') END ) AS STATUS_NAME FROM (SELECT IDX, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_STATUS, DE.PAGE_NAME, DE.URL, DE.NOTE, CONCAT(DE.COMPLETE_CNT , '/', DE.HOST_CNT) AS PROCESS_DATA, DATE_FORMAT(DE.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREDATE, DATE_FORMAT(DE.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ENDDATE FROM PI_DOWNLOAD_EXCEL DE WHERE USER_NO = #{user_no} AND ( DATE(DE.ENDDATE) > DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL ${time} DAY)) OR DE.ENDDATE IS NULL ) ) D
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_DOWNLOAD_EXCEL (USER_NO, FILE_NAME, real_file_name, host_cnt, credate, page_name, url) VALUES(#{user_no}, #{file_name}, #{real_file_name}, #{host_cnt}, NOW(), #{page_name}, #{url})
